title: Jerry Use Case Realization Schema
description: Validates use case artifact YAML frontmatter produced by uc-author and uc-slicer agents. Implements Cockburn's 12-step use case structure with Jacobson UC 2.0 slice extensions. Source: skills/use-case/rules/use-case-writing-rules.md, skills/use-case/SKILL.md.

id.description: Use case identifier. Format: UC-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}. Example: UC-LIB-001.

title.description: Use case title. Short, verb-phrase form (e.g., 'Borrow a Book').

work_type.description: Discriminator field. Always USE_CASE for use case artifacts.

goal_level.description: Cockburn goal level. SUMMARY (+): cloud-level, above user goals. USER_GOAL (!): sea-level, primary. SUBFUNCTION (-): underwater, below user goals.

goal_symbol.description: Goal level symbol. Must be consistent with goal_level: SUMMARY=+, USER_GOAL=!, SUBFUNCTION=-. Enforced by allOf constraints.

domain.description: Short domain code used in the UC identifier. Example: LIB, AUTH, INV.

scope.description: System or subsystem boundary. Free-form string (e.g., 'Library Management System').

primary_actor.description: The actor whose goal drives this use case.

detail_level.description: Cockburn detail level. Progressive elaboration: BRIEFLY_DESCRIBED -> BULLETED_OUTLINE -> ESSENTIAL_OUTLINE -> FULLY_DESCRIBED.

trigger.description: The event that initiates this use case.

preconditions.description: Conditions that must be true before the use case starts.

success.description: Observable outcomes when the use case succeeds.

failure.description: Observable outcomes when the use case fails.

postconditions.description: Guaranteed outcomes categorized by success and failure.

basic_flow.description: Main success scenario steps (3-9 steps per Cockburn guidelines).

extensions.description: Exception/alternative paths branching from basic_flow steps. Required for /test-spec generation at ESSENTIAL_OUTLINE or above.

alternative_flows.description: Complete alternative paths through the use case.

supporting_actors.description: Secondary actors involved in the use case.

stakeholders.description: Stakeholders and their interests in this use case.

priority.description: Use case priority. P1=Critical, P2=High, P3=Medium, P4=Low.

realization_level.description: UC 2.0 realization progress. OUTLINED: basic structure exists. STORY_DEFINED: slices defined with INVEST assessment. INTERACTION_DEFINED: interactions[] populated, enables /contract-design.

slices.description: Jacobson UC 2.0 slices. Present when realization_level >= STORY_DEFINED.

slice_ids.description: References to slice IDs for cross-referencing.

interactions.description: System boundary interactions. Required when realization_level = INTERACTION_DEFINED. Consumed by /contract-design cd-generator.

related_use_cases.description: References to related use case IDs.

parent_id.description: Parent use case ID for sub-use-cases. Null for top-level use cases.

created_by.description: Agent or user that created this artifact.

last_modified_by.description: Agent or user that last modified this artifact.

actor.description: Actor performing this step. Must be primary_actor, a supporting_actor name, or 'System'.

action.description: What the actor does in this step.

type.description: Step classification for Clark transformation mapping. actor_action -> When clause, system_response -> Then clause, validation -> Then assertion clause.

id.description: Extension identifier. Format: EXT-{anchor_step}{letter}. Example: EXT-2A.

anchor_step.description: Basic flow step number where this extension branches.

condition.description: The condition that triggers this extension.

outcome.description: Extension outcome. success: separate successful end state. failure: use case fails. rejoin:{step}: returns to basic flow at specified step.

id.description: Alternative flow identifier. Format: AF-{NN}. Example: AF-01.

condition.description: Condition that triggers this alternative flow.

title.description: Slice title describing the vertical slice of behavior.

steps_included.description: Basic flow step numbers included in this slice.

invest_assessment.description: INVEST criteria assessment for slice sizing.

test_cases.description: Test case references. Populated at PREPARED state and beyond.

id.description: Interaction identifier. Format: INT-{NN} or INT-{NNN} for use cases with >99 interactions. Examples: INT-01, INT-100.

source_step.description: References the basic_flow or extension step number.

source_flow.description: Flow containing the source step. basic_flow, AF-{NN}, or EXT-{step}{letter}.

request_description.description: What the actor requests from the system.

response_description.description: What the system responds to the actor.

extensions.description: Extensions are required at ESSENTIAL_OUTLINE and FULLY_DESCRIBED detail levels for complete use case specification.

allOf.description: INTERACTION_DEFINED realization requires at minimum ESSENTIAL_OUTLINE detail level. BRIEFLY_DESCRIBED and BULLETED_OUTLINE cannot support interaction sequences.
